text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Manhattan Cafe on the roof, talking to a
certain someone.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's because I'm racing too much? Maybe... I do
feel kind of sluggish...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...That could be part of it too. I just... feel so worn
out lately...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I get in bed, shut my eyes... and next thing I
know, it's morning...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I just want to dream again...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
To dive into that sea of stars, and sink quietly...
deeper and deeper...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She definitely looks tired. The nonstop racing
must be taking its toll on her. I should adjust her
schedule.
